core_mechanism: deterministic time-evolution of a spatially homogeneous system governed by a first-order ordinary differential equation linking a global expansion/growth rate to the system's energy/matter content
brief_reason: The abstract is a purely pedagogical overview of 'cosmology' with no method stated, so the most specific defensible machinery is the field's canonical Friedmann-type evolution equation for a homogeneous background, but the text itself supports only this coarse description.
